title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 37.
content:
There was an Old Person of Basing,
    Whose presence of mind was amazing;
    He purchased a steed,
    Which he rode at full speed,
    And escaped from the people of Basing.
meaning:
"Book Of Nonsense Limerick 37." is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
